allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const css = fs.readFileSync\('src/assets/css/style.css','utf8'\); const lines = css.split\('\\n'\); console.log\('총 라인 수:', lines.length\); const issues = []; if \(!css.includes\('backdrop-filter'\)\) issues.push\('backdrop-filter 없음'\); if \(!css.includes\('hn-drop-in'\)\) issues.push\('드롭다운 애니메이션 없음'\); if \(!css.includes\('scaleX'\)\) issues.push\('슬라이딩 언더라인 없음'\); if \(!css.includes\('scrolled'\)\) issues.push\('scrolled 클래스 없음'\); if \(issues.length\) console.log\('문제:', issues\); else console.log\('모든 스타일 확인 완료'\);")
